text: Answer FOUR of the ten essay questions.
Where appropriate (e.g. for formulae, equations, or diagrams) you may hand write your answers using the Inspera Scan Paper provided.
Candidates should not copy and paste images from any other documents.
Note: Inspera Scan question codes MUST be noted during the exam.

sub-instructions: ⓘ Answer FOUR of the ten essays.
content: Describe how molecular cloning and electrophysiology research have contributed to our understanding of the structure and function of voltage gated sodium and potassium ion channels.
Discuss the response properties of the main types of cutaneous receptors in an area of glabrous skin.
Discuss the encoding of sound frequency in the mammalian auditory system.
Discuss what determines the spatial acuity of the vertebrate visual system.
Compare and contrast phototransduction with olfactory and gustatory chemotransduction.
Critically discuss the cellular and molecular mechanisms of neuroectoderm induction.
How does disinhibition influence the function of the motor system?
Both synaptic long -term potentiation (LTP) and long -term depression (LTD) require Ca2+ ions for their induction. Discuss how the same ion can mediate both LTP and LTD.
How important was the amnesic patient, Henry Molaison (HM), for informing our understanding of the neural basis of episodic memory?

When administered acutely, all drugs of abuse increase dopamine release in the brain, however, changes in dopamine neurotransmission are not considered a sufficient explanation for addiction. Explain.
